# loadTextures(using:)

**Instance Method**

Loads textures using resolver for string paths and NSURLs.

## Declaration

```swift
func loadTextures(using resolver: any MDLAssetResolver)
```

## Parameters

- **resolver**: If non-nil, the resolver converts stringValues or NSURLs to MDLTextureSampler values.

## Discussion

Iterates all material properties. If there are string values or NSURL values, and you can resolve the values as textures, then [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLTextureSampler] values replaces the string and NSURL values.

## Working with textures using resolvers

- **resolveTextures(with:)**: Resolves all texture string paths as NSURLs with resolver.
